briefs.title: Council to Consider: Vancouver Fraser Port Authority Update on Second Narrows Dredging Works
briefs.summary: The Vancouver Fraser Port Authority is set to appear before Burnaby City Council to present an update on dredging works at Second Narrows. Representatives will give a short slide presentation and answer questions from Council and the community.
briefs.action_required: Attend the February 10, 2026 Council meeting if the Second Narrows dredging works affect your business.

key_dates.label: Vancouver Fraser Port Authority — Second Narrows dredging update presentation to Burnaby Council
